theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Real estate management and financial tracking require absolute clarity, authority, and function-first design. The Swiss archetype provides high-contrast data visualization, making complex property matrices and financial splits highly legible without visual clutter.

rules.tinted_grey: All greys must have a slight cool blue undertone to feel architectural rather than muddy.
rules.contrast: Text below 18px must meet WCAG AA 4.5:1. Use APCA contrast calculator if in doubt. No gray-on-gray data.
rules.gradients: BANNED. Use flat colors or 1px strokes. Only the 'AI Upload' component can use a subtle blue mesh glow.

grid_system.base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

rules.optical_alignment: Align icons and text optically. Padding inside bordered containers must prevent text collision.
rules.f_pattern: Place the North Star Metric (Total Income / Occupancy) at top-left.

ai_upload_zone.wrapper: relative border-2 border-dashed border-ai_accent/40 bg-ai_accent_light/20 rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-all hover:bg-ai_accent_light/40 hover:border-ai_accent

component_rules.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons are solid black (bg-primary text-primary-foreground). Never use rounded-full for main CTA, use rounded-md.
component_rules.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components. Use flat borders, no heavy shadows. Add focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary.
component_rules.tables: Must use sticky headers for scrolling. Financial columns (Rents, IVA, Net) MUST be right-aligned.
component_rules.tabs: Override Shadcn default h-9 to h-auto. Use pill-style or clean underline tabs for Properties vs Units.
component_rules.badges: Flat background with high contrast text. Statuses: Occupied (Green), Vacant (Gray), Vacation (Blue).

properties_and_units_integration.design: Properties act as parent rows. Clicking a property expands a sub-table displaying its rentable units (Local, Estudio, Dúplex, Dormitorio). This prevents navigating away and keeps context.

dashboard_kpis.layout: Top row, 4-column grid. Clean, large digits (font-mono) with micro-trend indicators.

ai_invoice_upload.location: Prominent floating action block or dedicated 'Facturación' section.
ai_invoice_upload.interaction: Drag & drop zone. Upon upload, simulate an 'OCR Scanning' micro-interaction, followed by a summary card showing the auto-calculated split among tenants based on their predefined percentages.
ai_invoice_upload.visuals: Use the 'ai_invoice_upload_empty' image as a background graphic for the empty state.

financials_iva_retenciones.display: In Collections/Rentas view, use a stacked or detailed column approach: [Bruto] -> [+ IVA] -> [- Retenciones] -> [Neto]. Net amount should be bold.

vacation_rental_calendar.design: A timeline/Gantt chart view for units marked as 'Vacacional'. Color-coded by status (Booked, Blocked, Available). Configurable sidebar for Daily/Weekly/Monthly rate management.

hero_backgrounds_and_empty_states.usage: Use as a subtle background for the Login/Welcome screen or empty states in the Dashboard.

hero_backgrounds_and_empty_states.description: Blank invoice receipt with glowing scanning line
hero_backgrounds_and_empty_states.usage: Display inside the AI Subir Factura dropzone when no file is uploaded to guide the user visually.

property_placeholders.usage: Cover image for Dúplex or Premium properties in list view.
Cover image for Estudios or standard properties.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle transform translate-y-[-2px] on cards with a shadow-md elevation.
motion_and_interactions.ai_processing: When AI is reading the invoice, display a skeleton loader with a pulsing blue border and shimmering text 'GPT-4o Analizando factura...'.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON structures and E1 design methodologies provided.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the exact URLs provided in 'media_and_images'.
Build a Left-Sidebar layout for navigation (Dashboard, Inmuebles, Facturación, Calendario Vacacional).
The Dashboard should contain only the KPIs at the top and actionable widgets (like AI Factura Upload), completely removing old tables of pending rents.
For the 'Inmuebles' section, implement Shadcn Data Table with expandable rows. Parent row = Inmueble. Expanded content = Sub-table of Unidades (Local, Estudio, Dúplex, Dormitorio).
Implement the 'Subir Factura' feature as a prominent AI widget. The mock flow should show uploading a file -> parsing state -> displaying a split table based on tenant percentages.
Ensure all financial tables calculate or display 'Bruto', 'IVA', 'Retenciones', and 'Neto'.
